es.home.quoteTitle: Diseña tu viaje a Cusco en minutos
es.home.quoteText: Arma un paquete con Machu Picchu, Valle Sagrado, hoteles, trenes y extras según tus fechas reales de llegada y salida.

es.home.seoTitle: Tours a Cusco, Machu Picchu y Perú con expertos locales
es.home.seoText1: My Cusco Trip organiza experiencias turísticas en Cusco, Machu Picchu y los principales destinos del Perú. Diseñamos tours diarios, paquetes completos, rutas de aventura y viajes personalizados para viajeros que buscan seguridad, buena organización y atención cercana desde el primer contacto.
es.home.seoText2: Te ayudamos a revisar disponibilidad, elegir la mejor alternativa según tu fecha de viaje y recibir asistencia antes de confirmar tu reserva.
es.home.pkg2dDesc: La forma más cómoda de visitar la ciudadela con noche en Machu Picchu Pueblo.
es.home.pkg3dDesc: Ideal para una primera visita con Cusco, experiencias suaves y Machu Picchu.
es.home.pkg4dDesc: Una ruta equilibrada con Valle Sagrado y visita organizada a Machu Picchu.
es.home.pkg5dDesc: Machu Picchu, Valle Sagrado y una ruta natural como Vinicunca o Humantay.
es.home.pkg6dDesc: Más tiempo para combinar Machu Picchu, Valle Sagrado y tours de naturaleza.
es.home.pkg7dDesc: Una semana para sumar experiencias culturales y rutas de aventura sin correr.
es.home.pkg8dDesc: Más días para visitar Machu Picchu, Valle Sagrado, Maras, Moray y rutas naturales.
es.home.pkg9dDesc: Una ruta amplia para combinar iconos de Cusco con caminatas y paisajes andinos.
es.home.pkg10dDesc: La alternativa más completa para explorar Cusco con descansos y rutas a medida.
es.search.hint: Selecciona tus fechas y criterios de búsqueda para encontrar la mejor experiencia para tu viaje.

es.product.paceComplete: Ritmo completo · más visitas en Valle Sagrado
es.product.paceComfortable: Ritmo cómodo · ideal para primera visita
es.product.routeDescriptionIntenseNature: Pensada para viajeros que quieren sumar los paisajes naturales más fuertes de Cusco, con días de caminata y descansos intercalados.
es.product.routeDescriptionAdventure: Combina los imperdibles culturales con una salida de naturaleza para darle variedad al viaje sin hacerlo demasiado pesado.
es.product.routeDescriptionConnection: Ruta eficiente que conecta Valle Sagrado con Machu Picchu y reduce traslados repetidos.
es.product.routeDescriptionClassic: Opción equilibrada para conocer Cusco, Valle Sagrado y Machu Picchu con un ritmo cómodo.
es.product.routeDescriptionSuggested: Ruta sugerida según duración, horarios de llegada y experiencias principales del paquete.

en.home.seoTitle: Cusco, Machu Picchu and Peru tours with local experts
en.home.seoText1: My Cusco Trip organizes travel experiences in Cusco, Machu Picchu and the main destinations of Peru. We design day tours, complete packages, adventure routes and custom trips for travelers looking for safety, good organization and close support from the first contact.
en.home.seoText2: We help you check availability, choose the best option for your travel date and receive assistance before confirming your reservation.
en.home.pkg2dDesc: The most comfortable way to visit the citadel with one night in Machu Picchu Pueblo.
en.home.pkg3dDesc: Ideal for a first visit with Cusco, soft experiences and Machu Picchu.
en.home.pkg4dDesc: A balanced route with the Sacred Valley and an organized Machu Picchu visit.
en.home.pkg5dDesc: Machu Picchu, the Sacred Valley and a natural route such as Vinicunca or Humantay.
en.home.pkg6dDesc: More time to combine Machu Picchu, the Sacred Valley and nature tours.
en.home.pkg7dDesc: A full week to add cultural experiences and adventure routes without rushing.
en.home.pkg8dDesc: More days to visit Machu Picchu, the Sacred Valley, Maras, Moray and natural routes.
en.home.pkg9dDesc: A broader route to combine Cusco icons with hikes and Andean landscapes.
en.home.pkg10dDesc: The most complete alternative to explore Cusco with rest time and custom routes.

pt.home.seoText1: My Cusco Trip organiza experiências turísticas em Cusco, Machu Picchu e nos principais destinos do Peru. pt.home.seoText2: Ajudamos você a revisar disponibilidade, escolher a melhor alternativa para sua data de viagem e receber assistência antes de confirmar sua reserva.

fr.home.quoteTitle: Créez votre voyage à Cusco en quelques minutes
fr.home.quoteText: Composez un forfait avec Machu Picchu, la Vallée Sacrée, hôtels, trains et extras selon vos vraies dates d’arrivée et de départ.
fr.home.packagesTitle: Forfaits Cusco et Machu Picchu les plus demandés
fr.home.packagesText: Commencez par un itinéraire de base et personnalisez hôtels, trains et extras dans le module de devis.
fr.home.seoTitle: Tours à Cusco, Machu Picchu et au Pérou avec des experts locaux
fr.home.seoText1: My Cusco Trip organise des expériences touristiques à Cusco, au Machu Picchu et dans les principales destinations du Pérou. Nous créons des tours quotidiens, des forfaits complets, des itinéraires d’aventure et des voyages personnalisés pour les voyageurs qui recherchent sécurité, bonne organisation et accompagnement dès le premier contact.
fr.home.seoText2: Nous vous aidons à vérifier les disponibilités, choisir la meilleure option selon votre date de voyage et recevoir une assistance avant de confirmer votre réservation.
fr.home.pkg2dDesc: The most comfortable way to visit the citadel with one night in Machu Picchu Pueblo.
fr.home.pkg3dDesc: Ideal for a first visit with Cusco, soft experiences and Machu Picchu.
fr.home.pkg4dDesc: A balanced route with the Sacred Valley and an organized Machu Picchu visit.
fr.home.pkg5dDesc: Machu Picchu, the Sacred Valley and a natural route such as Vinicunca or Humantay.
fr.home.pkg6dDesc: More time to combine Machu Picchu, the Sacred Valley and nature tours.
fr.home.pkg7dDesc: A full week to add cultural experiences and adventure routes without rushing.
fr.home.pkg8dDesc: More days to visit Machu Picchu, the Sacred Valley, Maras, Moray and natural routes.
fr.home.pkg9dDesc: A broader route to combine Cusco icons with hikes and Andean landscapes.
fr.home.pkg10dDesc: The most complete alternative to explore Cusco with rest time and custom routes.

fr.product.packageOptionsIntro: Choisissez l'itinéraire qui correspond le mieux à votre rythme de voyage, à vos intérêts et aux lieux que vous souhaitez visiter. Vous pouvez changer d'option sans perdre votre réservation.

fr.product.paceMediumHigh: Rythme moyen/soutenu · inclut une randonnée panoramique
fr.product.paceComplete: Rythme complet · plus de visites dans la Vallée Sacrée
fr.product.paceEfficient: Rythme efficace · moins de transferts répétés
fr.product.paceComfortable: Rythme confortable · idéal pour une première visite
fr.product.routeDescriptionIntenseNature: Pensé pour les voyageurs qui souhaitent ajouter les paysages naturels les plus forts de Cusco, avec des journées de randonnée et des temps de repos équilibrés.
fr.product.routeDescriptionAdventure: Combine les incontournables culturels avec une sortie nature pour varier le voyage sans le rendre trop chargé.
fr.product.routeDescriptionConnection: Itinéraire efficace reliant la Vallée Sacrée à Machu Picchu et réduisant les transferts répétés.

fr.product.routeDescriptionSuggested: Itinéraire suggéré selon la durée, les horaires d'arrivée et les expériences principales du forfait.

de.home.seoTitle: Cusco, Machu Picchu and Peru tours with local experts
de.home.seoText1: My Cusco Trip organizes travel experiences in Cusco, Machu Picchu and the main destinations of Peru. We design day tours, complete packages, adventure routes and custom trips for travelers looking for safety, good organization and close support from the first contact.
de.home.seoText2: We help you check availability, choose the best option for your travel date and receive assistance before confirming your reservation.
de.home.pkg2dDesc: The most comfortable way to visit the citadel with one night in Machu Picchu Pueblo.
de.home.pkg3dDesc: Ideal for a first visit with Cusco, soft experiences and Machu Picchu.

de.home.pkg5dDesc: Machu Picchu, the Sacred Valley and a natural route such as Vinicunca or Humantay.

de.home.pkg9dDesc: A broader route to combine Cusco icons with hikes and Andean landscapes.
de.home.pkg10dDesc: The most complete alternative to explore Cusco with rest time and custom routes.

de.product.itineraryPending: Der detaillierte Reiseverlauf wird nach Ihren Reisedaten koordiniert.
de.product.faqPending: Häufige Fragen werden in Kürze ergänzt.
de.product.packageOptionsIntro: Wählen Sie die Route, die am besten zu Ihrem Reisetempo, Ihren Interessen und bevorzugten Orten passt. Sie können die Option wechseln, ohne Ihre Reservierung zu verlieren.
de.product.paceHighNature: Hohes Tempo · mehr Natur und Wanderungen
de.product.paceComplete: Vollständiges Tempo · mehr Besuche im Heiligen Tal
de.product.paceComfortable: Angenehmes Tempo · ideal für den ersten Besuch
de.product.routeDescriptionIntenseNature: Für Reisende, die Cuscos stärkste Naturlandschaften mit Wandertagen und ausgewogenen Pausen erleben möchten.
de.product.routeDescriptionAdventure: Kombiniert kulturelle Höhepunkte mit einem Naturausflug, damit die Reise abwechslungsreich bleibt, ohne zu schwer zu werden.
de.product.routeDescriptionConnection: Effiziente Route, die das Heilige Tal mit Machu Picchu verbindet und wiederholte Transfers reduziert.
de.product.routeDescriptionClassic: Ausgewogene Option, um Cusco, das Heilige Tal und Machu Picchu in angenehmem Tempo kennenzulernen.
de.product.routeDescriptionSuggested: Vorgeschlagene Route basierend auf Dauer, Ankunftszeiten und den wichtigsten Erlebnissen des Pakets.
de.product.allInclusiveServicesText: Fügt empfohlene Tickets, Eintritte, Mittagessen und Leistungen automatisch hinzu.
de.product.departureTimeFixed: Diese Tour hat eine feste Abfahrtszeit.
de.product.departureTimeHelp: Wählen Sie Ihre bevorzugte Uhrzeit. Das Reservierungsteam prüft die endgültige Verfügbarkeit.
de.product.travelAssistance: Reisebetreuung vor und während des Erlebnisses
de.product.professionalGuideIncluded: Professionelle Reiseleitung auf Spanisch und Englisch
de.product.consetturBus: Consettur-Bus hinauf und hinunter nach Machu Picchu
de.product.accommodationByCategory: Unterkunft gemäß ausgewählter Kategorie und Zimmerart
de.product.configurableHotelsText: Die Unterkunft kann nach Zielort, Kategorie und Verfügbarkeit angepasst werden. Das finale Angebot wird in einem personalisierten Kostenvoranschlag geprüft.
de.product.customQuoteText: Unser Team kann die endgültige Route nach Reisedaten, Hotels, Inlandsflügen und Reisewünschen vorbereiten.

ja.home.featuredTitle: クスコとマチュピチュで人気の体験
ja.home.featuredText: Choose from classic tours, adventure routes and experiences designed by local specialists.
ja.home.featuredNote: Prices, schedules and availability may vary according to season, trains and entrance availability.
ja.home.quoteTitle: 数分でクスコ旅行を作成
ja.home.quoteText: Build a package with Machu Picchu, the Sacred Valley, hotels, trains and extras according to your real arrival and departure dates.
ja.home.packagesTitle: Top-requested Cusco and Machu Picchu packages
ja.home.packagesText: Start with a base route and customize hotels, trains and extras inside the quote builder.
ja.home.seoTitle: Cusco, Machu Picchu and Peru tours with local experts
ja.home.seoText1: My Cusco Trip organizes travel experiences in Cusco, Machu Picchu and the main destinations of Peru. We design day tours, complete packages, adventure routes and custom trips for travelers looking for safety, good organization and close support from the first contact.
ja.home.seoText2: We help you check availability, choose the best option for your travel date and receive assistance before confirming your reservation.
ja.home.pkg2dDesc: The most comfortable way to visit the citadel with one night in Machu Picchu Pueblo.
ja.home.pkg3dDesc: Ideal for a first visit with Cusco, soft experiences and Machu Picchu.
ja.home.pkg4dDesc: A balanced route with the Sacred Valley and an organized Machu Picchu visit.
ja.home.pkg5dDesc: Machu Picchu, the Sacred Valley and a natural route such as Vinicunca or Humantay.
ja.home.pkg6dDesc: More time to combine Machu Picchu, the Sacred Valley and nature tours.
ja.home.pkg7dDesc: A full week to add cultural experiences and adventure routes without rushing.
ja.home.pkg8dDesc: More days to visit Machu Picchu, the Sacred Valley, Maras, Moray and natural routes.
ja.home.pkg9dDesc: A broader route to combine Cusco icons with hikes and Andean landscapes.
ja.home.pkg10dDesc: The most complete alternative to explore Cusco with rest time and custom routes.
